key.name: scroll-speed
key.description: Auto-scroll speed used by the teleprompter.

key.name: text-size
key.description: Displayed text size for the teleprompter.

key.name: mirror-mode
key.description: Whether the teleprompter text is mirrored horizontally.

key.name: fullscreen-on-start
key.description: Whether the app should start in fullscreen mode.
